changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ad_set ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, external_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, platform VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, ad_account_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, campaign_external_id VARCHAR(64), campaign_id BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT fk_ad_set_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id), CONSTRAINT fk_adset_campaign FOREIGN KEY (campaign_id) REFERENCES campaign(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT uq_adset_user_platform_account_ext UNIQUE (user_id, platform, ad_account_id, external_id) );

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ad_set CASCADE;
